get.summary: Exhibition ordered-home aggregation canonical path for Flutter App

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Current request device latitude hint only. This hint does not create persisted location truth.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Current request device longitude hint only. This hint does not create persisted location truth.

parameters.name: provinceCode
parameters.description: Current request effective province hint only. `BFF` may still prefer the current manual selection when one exists in the current session.

parameters.name: provinceName
parameters.description: Current request effective province display hint only.

parameters.name: locationPermissionState
parameters.description: Client-reported device location permission state for current home aggregation only.

200.description: Ordered exhibition home aggregation for Flutter App. This path freezes one normalized first-screen read model only, including the current location and weather card, six module containers, and ordered recommendation sections. The current weather card may include the V1 construction warning semantic layer, but it must not become weather truth, location truth, a second recommendation state machine, or a second private dashboard.

400.description: Controlled effective-location unavailable response. When neither current request hints, current session selection, nor allowed fallback context can resolve a usable location, `BFF` must return `LOCATION_REQUIRED` or `LOCATION_PERMISSION_UNAVAILABLE`.

503.description: Controlled home aggregation unavailable response. `BFF` must normalize upstream weather or aggregation failures into `HOME_WEATHER_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` or `HOME_AGGREGATION_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Refresh ordered exhibition home aggregation via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Optional current request location context only. Refresh must rebuild the full current home aggregation, not only the weather block.

200.description: Refreshed exhibition ordered-home aggregation. This success body is the same normalized full-home read model returned by `GET /api/app/exhibition/home`, including the current V1 construction warning semantic layer when available.

400.description: Controlled effective-location unavailable response. `BFF` must return `LOCATION_REQUIRED` or `LOCATION_PERMISSION_UNAVAILABLE` when refresh cannot determine the effective location.

504.description: Controlled full-home refresh timeout response. `BFF` must return `HOME_REFRESH_TIMEOUT` when the current full-home aggregation exceeds the timeout boundary.

503.description: Controlled home aggregation unavailable response. `BFF` must normalize upstream weather or aggregation failures into `HOME_WEATHER_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` or `HOME_AGGREGATION_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Select current exhibition home location via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Manual current-location selection request for the ordered exhibition home only. In the current round this handoff may stay `BFF`-controlled and non-persistent.

200.description: Location selection accepted for the current ordered home aggregation. When the current round does not persist location to `Server`, the returned read model must explicitly mark `selectionScope` and `selectionNotice` instead of pretending the choice was stored permanently. The returned read model may also refresh the current V1 construction warning semantic layer.

400.description: Controlled location selection invalid response. When the current manual selection body cannot produce a usable effective province, `BFF` must return `LOCATION_REQUIRED`.

200.description: Resolved enterprise location candidate. `Server` remains the only owner of the enterprise location truth; BFF only forwards and shapes this candidate for the workbench save flow.

400.description: Controlled invalid resolve response. `BFF` must return `ENTERPRISE_LOCATION_RESOLVE_INVALID` for malformed resolve input; `Server` may return `ENTERPRISE_LOCATION_RESOLVE_FAILED` when the provider returns no usable result and the request cannot be represented as a text-only candidate.

401.description: Controlled unauthenticated response. `BFF` must return `AUTH_SESSION_INVALID` when current actor session is unavailable.

403.description: Controlled permission response. `Server` must return `ENTERPRISE_HUB_PERMISSION_DENIED` when the current actor lacks organization scope for enterprise location resolution.

503.description: Controlled provider response. `Server` must return `ENTERPRISE_LOCATION_PROVIDER_CONFIG_MISSING` or `ENTERPRISE_LOCATION_RESOLVE_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE` when Amap cannot be used under the current cloud runtime.

get.summary: Exhibition project list canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum project showcase-list read surface for Flutter App. Each item uses the frozen `ProjectShowcaseListItemReadModel` only. This list contract admits the card fields `title`, `buildingType`, `budgetAmount`, `state`, `summary`, optional `areaSqm`, and standardized province/city `code + name` only; it must not reopen district detail, free-text address, scope, schedule, description, or formal attachment-list fields. Lightweight region/type/state or raw-area labels remain derivable from these fields and do not become an explicit `tags` array in the shared list contract.

post.summary: Exhibition project create canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum project create command request for current Flutter App consumption. This request now freezes the minimum project publish standardized location carrier for create/detail as `provinceCode + provinceName`, `cityCode + cityName`, optional `districtCode + districtName`, and free-text `detailAddress`; for Round B only, the admitted richer fields `areaSqm`, `buildingTypeRemark`, and `scheduleDetail` remain within the already frozen project-publish truth boundary and must not reopen budget range, reward amount, or pre-create attachment binding semantics.

202.description: Minimum project create command success body for Flutter App. The current frontend success chain freezes only `projectId + state`; this response must not expand into a full `ProjectReadModel`, bid handoff, order handoff, or any second command-success field model.

get.summary: Exhibition project editable detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Owner-scoped editable project detail surface for the lifecycle chain only. This path supports create-after-jump, edit re-entry, save refresh, submit refresh, and publish refresh, and must not create a second public-detail family.

post.summary: Publish submitted project canonical path for Flutter App with green-channel feedback gate

202.description: Project publish accepted only when the current submitted project has the three required quote-basis attachment kinds and the current publisher has submitted the project-authenticity-sincerity green channel feedback choice. This path must not auto-create a sincerity order, auto-charge, or silently treat publish success as pricing consumption success.

409.description: Controlled publish pricing-gate or invalid-state response. Server must fail closed with `PROJECT_AUTHENTICITY_SINCERITY_INTERNAL_TEST_POLICY_UNAVAILABLE`, `PROJECT_AUTHENTICITY_SINCERITY_REQUIRED`, or `PROJECT_AUTHENTICITY_SINCERITY_INVALID_STATE` when the required quote-basis attachment truth, green-channel feedback truth, or project state is not admitted for publish.

ProjectCreateRequest.description: Minimum project create command request only. This request now freezes the minimum standardized location and address-and-scope carrier for project publish create/detail. Province and city now use canonical `code + name` pairs; district uses the same `code + name` contract when district detail is separately provided. `detailAddress` remains free text and does not carry classification truth. For Round B, the admitted richer create/detail fields are `areaSqm`, `buildingTypeRemark`, and `scheduleDetail`. `districtCode`, `districtName`, `plannedStartAt`, `plannedEndAt`, `description`, `areaSqm`, `buildingTypeRemark`, and `scheduleDetail` remain optional in the current frozen boundary.

title.description: Compatibility title carrier. `legacy-title mode` may submit only this field. In `dual-field mode`, backend still materializes and persists a non-empty compatibility title, but `title` is no longer the primary display identity truth.

exhibitionName.description: Canonical exhibition identity field for `dual-field mode`. When provided, `brandName` must travel together.

brandName.description: Canonical brand identity field for `dual-field mode`. When provided, `exhibitionName` must travel together.

areaSqm.description: Optional project area in canonical `sqm` units only. When provided, the value must be positive and use at most two decimal places. This field is admitted for Round B create/detail truth only and does not yet imply list or workbench projection ownership.

buildingTypeRemark.description: Optional supplementary remark for the current coarse `buildingType`. This field does not replace `buildingType`, does not create a second project-type truth family, and should be omitted or `null` when no extra remark is provided.

provinceCode.description: Required canonical province classification code. This field carries standardized region truth for publish, downstream display grouping, regional classification, and search filtering. It must travel with `provinceName`.

provinceName.description: Required human-readable province display value paired with `provinceCode`.

cityCode.description: Required canonical city classification code. This field carries standardized region truth for publish, downstream display grouping, regional classification, and search filtering. It must travel with `cityName`.

cityName.description: Required human-readable city display value paired with `cityCode`.

districtCode.description: Optional canonical district or county classification code. When district detail is separately provided, this field must travel with `districtName`; when district is not separately provided, both fields may be omitted or `null`.

districtName.description: Optional human-readable district or county display value paired with `districtCode`. When district is not separately provided, both district fields may be omitted or `null`.

detailAddress.description: Required detailed text address for the current project site. This field must not be hidden inside `description` and does not carry standardized region classification truth.

scopeSummary.description: Required minimum publish-scope summary for the current project create/detail chain only.

plannedStartAt.description: Optional planned start date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. When omitted or `null`, the current publish boundary treats the start date as not yet confirmed.

plannedEndAt.description: Optional planned end date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. When omitted or `null`, the current publish boundary treats the end date as not yet confirmed.

scheduleDetail.description: Optional supplementary scheduling text for Round B only. This field may further explain `plannedStartAt` and `plannedEndAt`, but it is not a complete schedule object, not a time-slot array, and not a second calendar family.

ProjectCreateAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum project create command success body only. This response carries the created `projectId` plus current lifecycle `state` only and must not be expanded into a full project read model.

PricingCurrencyCode.description: Current pricing mainline currency freeze. This companion patch admits only CNY for the current `200 元项目真实性诚意金` and `4000 元竞标服务费预授权额度` objects.

PricingNextActionToken.description: Controlled pricing handoff token only. Consumers may use this field for CTA routing but must not derive amount truth, gate truth, or local payment success from it.

BidServiceFeeAuthorizationStatus.description: Canonical bounded state machine for the current project's `竞标服务费预授权额度` object only.

DealConfirmationStatus.description: Canonical bounded state machine for the current project's deal confirmation object only. `confirmed_deal` is the sole formal current deal-established state.

ProjectPricingPublisherSummary.description: Publisher-facing pricing summary carrier only. This object freezes the current `200 元项目真实性诚意金` and publish-gate summary for one current project only.

ProjectPricingBidderSummary.description: Bidder-facing pricing summary carrier only. This object freezes the current `4000 元竞标服务费预授权额度` and bid-submit gate summary for one current project only.

UploadInitRequest.description: Minimum shared upload init request for the current three-step upload corridor only. UploadDirectUploadStrategy.description: Direct upload transport directive only. This structure carries byte transport instructions and must not be interpreted as business truth.

UploadConfirmEndpoint.description: Confirm handoff descriptor only for step 3 of the shared upload corridor. This must not become a second upload family.

UploadInitResponse.description: Minimum upload-init strategy response for the shared `init -> direct upload -> confirm` corridor. No business truth is created until confirm succeeds.

UploadConfirmRequest.description: Minimum shared upload confirm request only. This request identifies the previously issued upload session for FileAsset truth confirmation.

UploadConfirmResponse.description: Minimum FileAsset confirmation response only. This response freezes the confirmed `FileAsset` truth reference by id; `objectKey` remains storage location only and stays outside the business contract. FileAccessMode.description: Shared app-facing file access mode. The public resource download zone currently uses `download`.

FileAccessResponse.description: Shared app-facing file access response. This response carries a time-bounded signed access URL anchored by `fileAssetId`; it must not expose `objectKey` as business or contract truth.

BidParticipationRequestStatus.description: Server-owned bid participation request state. Flutter and BFF must not invent or finalize this state locally.

BidParticipationRequestCreateRequest.description: Create request for the current bidder's participation request in one published project. This is not a standalone project-name request and carries no approval state.

BidParticipationRequestAcceptedResponse.description: Bid participation request accepted response. `status` remains Server-owned and must not be inferred by BFF or Flutter.

BidParticipationThreadDetailReadModel.description: Bid participation review thread detail. It may carry message-like display items and review handoff, but Server remains the request-state truth owner.

ProjectCommunicationBusinessTodoSummary.description: Server-owned business todo projection for project communication. This summary is not ordinary message unread and must not be inferred by BFF or Flutter from copy, attachment counts, workbench entry counts, or route availability.

lockReasonText.description: Chinese display reason when sending is locked.

ProjectCommunicationThreadReadModel.description: Minimal project communication thread read model. It exposes the project/thread anchors and Server-owned chat availability only; it does not own final amount, order, contract, payment, settlement, or fulfillment truth.

ProjectCommunicationMaterialReviewState.description: Server-owned material review state. Deal-confirmation entries must not carry this state as final amount truth.

ProjectCommunicationWorkbenchTruthAnchor.description: Structured Server truth anchor for workbench entries. Flutter must not parse labels or summaries to derive business truth.

badgeCount.description: Server-owned business todo badge count for this workbench tool. It is not ordinary unread and must not be inferred from attachment count, review state, or local UI state.

disabledReason.description: Chinese controlled reason when the tool is blocked or unavailable. Null means no disabled reason is needed for the current viewer.

ProjectCommunicationMaterialReviewReques.description: Material review command for the eight material entries only. It must not accept `contract_confirmation` or `final_confirmed_amount_confirmation`.

BidSubmitRequest.description: Minimum bid submit command request only. quoteSheetFileAssetId.description: Confirmed FileAsset id for the quote-sheet bid material.

schedulePlanFileAssetId.description: Confirmed FileAsset id for the schedule-plan bid material.

BidSeatLockRequest.description: Minimum bounded seat lock command request only. This request freezes only Package A seat lock input and must not expand into payment, guarantee, or compare-console truth.

BidSeatReleaseRequest.description: Minimum bounded seat release command request only. This request freezes only Package A seat release input and must not expand into payment or governance truth.

BidSeatLockAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum bounded seat lock accepted response only. The accepted seat id remains materialized and non-null for lock acceptance.

BidSeatReleaseAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum bounded seat release accepted response only. The accepted seat id remains materialized and non-null for release acceptance.

BidSeatStatusReadModel.description: Minimum bounded seat status read model only. In the `available` state the current backend truth may return `seatId: null` because no canonical seat row exists yet.

BidPackageCompletenessReadModel.description: Minimum bounded bid package completeness read model only. This response freezes only the structured Package A completeness projection and must not expand into a full proposal workspace.

BidServiceFeeAuthorizationReleaseRespons.description: Manual release response for the current bounded `竞标服务费预授权额度` object only.

BidThreadAvailability.description: Display-only availability projection. Server remains final permission owner and BFF/Flutter must not treat this as local permission truth.

attachmentFileAssetIds.description: Confirmed FileAsset ids only; objectKey is forbidden.

BidThreadDetailReadModel.description: Minimum project-bid private thread detail model for Trading IM Round A. It may carry messages, confirmation cards, and the bounded pricing-gate handoff carrier for the targeted relation only and must not become a generic conversation center.

OrderDetailMilestoneSummary.description: Controlled shared milestone summary carrier only for `milestone/list` and the embedded milestone continuation items inside `order/detail`. No internal summary fields are frozen in the current boundary.

milestones.description: Embedded continuation milestones only for `order/detail`. This does not freeze the standalone `milestone/list` route.

ProjectState.description: Current minimum project state set consumed by the Flutter App exhibition building.

displayTitle.description: App-facing project title display value. It may carry either the real title or the controlled project-name-access placeholder and must be consumed together with `nameAccess`.

brandName.description: Primary brand display truth for upgraded rows. Historical title-only rows may still return `null`.

provinceCode.description: Canonical province classification code for region grouping and future classification use. Historical rows may still return `null`.

provinceName.description: Human-readable province display value paired with `provinceCode`.

cityCode.description: Canonical city classification code for region grouping and future classification use. Historical rows may still return `null`.

cityName.description: Human-readable city display value paired with `cityCode`.

plannedStartAt.description: Optional planned start date shown on showcase cards when present.

plannedEndAt.description: Optional planned end date shown on showcase cards when present and also used by public read trimming.

publishedAt.description: Canonical app-facing publish time for rows that have entered the public showcase list. The truth source is Server `Project.publishedAt`.

ProjectNameAccessStatus.description: Controlled project-name-access status used by public project list and detail reads. BFF and Flutter must not invent additional statuses.

requestId.description: Current organization's existing name-access request id when available; otherwise `null`.

Server is the only owner of this truth; BFF may only project it and Flutter may only use it for display and navigation. This is not a bid detail read model and must not reopen compare, award, order, payment, or post-award surfaces.

ProjectReadModel.description: Shared showcase detail read model for the current Flutter App `project/detail` surface and the internal `GET /server/projects/{projectId}` pair only. This model carries the richer detail truth admitted by project publish and showcase alignment, including Round B fields, standardized district detail, free-text `detailAddress`, and detail `description`. For optional-auth owner-aware continuation, this model also carries the minimum `viewerProjectRelation` carrier only; it must not expose raw `creator_user_id`, raw `organization_id`, or any action matrix. `buildingTypeRemark` remains explanatory only and does not become classification truth. Formal attachment lists remain outside this shared detail contract and must enter a separate attachment-read contract freeze.

displayTitle.description: App-facing detail title display value. It may carry either the real title or the controlled project-name-access placeholder and must be consumed together with `nameAccess`.

exhibitionName.description: Primary exhibition display truth for upgraded rows. Historical title-only rows may still return `null`.

brandName.description: Primary brand display truth for upgraded rows. Historical title-only rows may still return `null`.

areaSqm.description: Optional Round B area carrier returned by `project/detail` when stored. This field supports detail display only and does not create unit-price truth or area-bucket taxonomy by itself.

buildingTypeRemark.description: Optional Round B supplementary type remark returned by `project/detail` when stored. This field supplements `buildingType` only and must not be promoted into type classification truth.

provinceCode.description: Canonical province classification code. `project/detail` must return the stored value when present; this code remains the region classification truth and not merely a display helper.

provinceName.description: Human-readable province display value paired with `provinceCode`.

cityCode.description: Canonical city classification code. `project/detail` must return the stored value when present; this code remains the region classification truth and not merely a display helper.

cityName.description: Human-readable city display value paired with `cityCode`.

districtCode.description: Canonical district or county classification code paired with `districtName` when district detail is separately stored. This field remains the district-level classification truth when district detail exists.

districtName.description: Human-readable district or county display value paired with `districtCode`.

detailAddress.description: Free-text detailed address. This field supports display and supplementary search text only; it does not carry canonical region classification truth.

scheduleDetail.description: Optional Round B supplementary scheduling text returned by `project/detail` when stored. This field is not a complete schedule object or time-slot array.

currentViewerBid.description: Current logged-in organization bid summary. `null` or missing means the current viewer has not submitted a bid for this project, is the owner, or is using an older upstream that does not yet provide the carrier.

description.description: Optional free-text supplementary project description for showcase detail only. This field does not make `project/list` a description owner and does not absorb address, scope, schedule, or attachment truth.

ProjectListResponse.description: Minimum list carrier for the current Flutter App showcase card pool. This response carries `ProjectShowcaseListItemReadModel` items only and must not silently grow into the richer detail model, explicit tag arrays, or attachment-bearing list semantics.

MyProjectFormalCompletionStatus.description: Minimum project-level formal-completion carrier for the private `my/projects` family only. This status is independent from `plannedEndAt`; planned end time must not be promoted into completion truth.

MyProjectEvaluationStatus.description: Minimum project-level evaluation-entry carrier for the private `my/projects` family only. `eligible` means rating entry is admitted after formal completion; `submitted` means the evaluation action has already completed. MyProjectPrivateProgressSummaryReadModel.description: Minimum private-progress summary carrier for a `my/projects` list item only. fulfillmentStatus.description: Minimum projected fulfillment-progress carrier only. This field must not become a second fulfillment workflow model.

acceptanceStatus.description: Minimum projected acceptance-status carrier only. This field must not create a second inspection or acceptance state machine.

projectCreatedAt.description: App-facing project creation time for private my-project list display only. Truth source is Server `Project.createdAt`; this field is not save time, update time, draft saved time, or recent operation time. BFF must not synthesize it from current time.

MyProjectPrivateProgressReadModel.description: Private project-level continuation carrier for single-project detail only. orderStatus.description: Minimum projected order-status carrier only. This field must not create a second order-detail truth family.

mimeType.description: File technical MIME recorded from FileAsset truth. Quote Basis Material Package V1 supports full-format files across all five attachment kinds; `attachmentKind` remains the business category truth and must not be inferred from MIME.

pricingSummary.description: Read-only pricing or authorization display projection only. This field must not become payment, settlement, order, or fulfillment truth.

ExhibitionHomeResponse.description: Normalized ordered exhibition home read model only. This response may aggregate current location and weather data, but it must not create persisted weather truth, persisted location truth, or a second home workflow state machine. The current weather block may include a V1 construction weather warning semantic layer shaped by `BFF` fixed rules only.

constructionRiskLevel.description: Current construction-risk level derived by `BFF` fixed-rule evaluation only.

constructionRiskSummary.description: User-facing fixed-template summary for today's construction risk.

riskTags.description: Active fixed-rule tags only. Current canonical values are: `rain`, `night_rain`, `high_temp`, `low_temp`, `strong_wind`, `lightning`, and `official_alert`.

riskTimeLabel.description: Current highest-priority construction-risk time label only. May be `null` when stable timing is unavailable.

nightRainExpected.description: Explicit current-night rain expectation for construction planning.

nightRainTimeLabel.description: Current-night rain time label only. May be `null` when stable timing is unavailable.

officialAlerts.description: Controlled user-facing official-alert strings only. This array may be empty.

constructionSuggestions.description: Fixed-template construction suggestions only. This field must not contain `LLM`-generated free text.

sourceLabel.description: User-facing controlled source label only. Provider-native labels remain hidden.

selectionNotice.description: Explicit current-round location persistence notice for direct frontend display.

ExhibitionHomeRefreshRequest.description: Optional current request refresh context only. Refresh still targets the current full-home projection, not a weather-only block.

ExhibitionHomeLocationSelectRequest.description: Manual current-location selection request for the ordered exhibition home only.

EnterpriseHubBoardProfile.description: Board-specific detail profile only. The selected shape must match the current enterprise primary board type.

EnterpriseHubCreateApplicationRequest.description: Create one enterprise hub application draft under the current authenticated organization scope only.

InstanceTodoRouteTarget.description: Controlled registered-entry projection only. This is not a local route name, not a second app-facing path, and not a complete `RegisteredInstanceEntryItem` exposure surface. The old `routeTarget.routeName` target contract has exited the formal schema.

localEntryKey.description: Consumer-local stable key only; not a route path.

requiredParams.description: Frozen minimum parameter shape for the selected registered entry.

state.description: Minimum registered-entry enablement state only. This state belongs to the projected entry target, not to the `instance_todo` item.

routeParams.description: Concrete parameter values bound to the frozen `requiredParams` shape.

state.description: Minimum `instance_todo` pending state only. This state belongs to the todo carrier item and must not be mixed with `routeTarget.state`, which belongs to the registered entry projection.

entryKey.description: Stable registration-row key for the unified instance entry registry.

canonicalPath.description: App-facing canonical entry reference only; not frontend routing detail.

consumerBuilding.description: Existing consumer building for the first pre-embed registration batch.

localEntryKey.description: Consumer-local stable key only; not a canonical path or route path.
